goal: 4-hour unattended open-house demo, visually flashy, loops forever, RTX A5000.
thoughts: Pedagogy/showcase angle: zero interaction required. Pick a demo with in-scene motion (humanoid walk loop, AMR route, manipulation sequence) — not an RL env that idles. Lock camera to cinematic angle. Disable auto-dim/screensaver. 4-hour stress: a demo that leaks memory crashes at hour 2 — warn.
code:
list_scene_templates()

# Pick a LOOPING demo (humanoid walk, warehouse AMR patrol)
quick_demo(demo_name="<LOOPING_HUMANOID_OR_AMR>")

# Lock a cinematic camera — no manual click needed
set_viewport_camera(
    camera_prim="/World/OpenHouseCam",
    position=[<X>, <Y>, <Z>],
    look_at=[<TX>, <TY>, <TZ>]
)

# Ensure animation/policy auto-plays and loops
play_animation(loop=True)

# Disable OS screensaver on projector workstation separately (not an Isaac tool)
# Fallback demo (if first requires input): <STATIC_CINEMATIC_FLYTHROUGH>
failure_modes: Picking an RL env that idles without a trained policy loaded
Memory leak in long-running demo — crashes at hour 2
Default viewport camera gets bumped by accidental mouse touch
OS screensaver kicks in — not an Isaac Sim fault but spoils the booth
